LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT U.S. BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, AS TRUSTEE FOR DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 9, 2012 AT 9:30AM TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501. DEFENDANT TO LODGE A COURTESY COPY OF THE COMPLAINT AND PLAINTIFF TO LODGE A COURTESY COPY OF HIS OPPOSITION PAPERS BY FEBRUARY 17 TO DEPARTMENT 501. PLEASE ATTACH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED

ORDER [SUSTAINING DEMURRER IN PART AND OVERRULING DEMURRER IN PART]
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-02-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT'S DEMURER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 1ST, 3RD, AND 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION TO ALLEGE SPECIFIC FACT, MORE THAN BELATED ASSIGNMENT, SHOWING THAT DEFENDANT HAS NO RIGHT TO FORECLOSE. SEE FRAZIER. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION TO ALLEGE DAMAGES CAUSED BY DEFENDANT'S MISREPRESENTATIONS. DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION. SEE ONOFRIO, FRAZIER AND VOGAN. ORER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE KSENIA TSENIN, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED.

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty.James S. Knopf of Attorney & Counselor at Law (650-627-9500) appearing for plaintiff Cyrus Lafarre opposing party.
Atty. Maria Schindler of Severson & Werson (415-398-3344) appearing for defendant U.S. Bank, national association. moving party.

Tentative ruling is adopted - Defendant's Demurer to Second Amended Complaint is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurer is sustained with leave to amend as to the 1st, 3rd, and 4th causes of action to allege specific fact, more than belated assignment, showing that defendant has no right to foreclose. See Frazier. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to 5th cause of action to allege damages caused by defendant's misrepresentations. Demurrer is overruled as to the 2nd cause of action. See Onofrio, Frazier and Vogan. Order signed in open court. Judge Ksenia Tsenin, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (KT/501)

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Maria Schindler of Severson & Werson (415-677-5597) appearing for defendant U.S. Bank of National Association as trustee for WFMBS 2006-AR 2 moving party. No other appearance.

After Discussion, The court adopted its tentative ruling as follow: DEFENDANT U.S. BANK's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.1) Overrule, as to first, fifth and sxith causes of action; first doesn't point out deficiences prr CCP 1060; fifth and sixth not proper to challenge veracity. 2) Sustain with leave to amend as to second cause of action to allege tender or exemption; 3) Sustain with leave to amend as to the third, fourth and eighth causes of action to allege requisite specificity and damages; 4) Sustain without leave to amend as to the seventh cause of action, substitution of trustee was in compliance with CC 2934(a)(1), RNJ Exh B. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, not reported. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, not reported. (501/REQ)
